body:
Makes several properties of `ty_gas_optics_rrtmgp` mutable / computed before initialization:
 - `AuxVars`
 - `AtmosVars`
 - `kmajor`
 - `is_key`
 - `gpoint_flavor`
 - `flavor`
 - `gas_names_present `
title: Move towards immutable `ty_gas_optics_rrtmgp`

body:
- Removes some indexes passed through function calls
 - Clean up some docs
 - Reduce use of indexes
title: Remove some indexes passed into funcs
